text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm out doing some shopping with
Hishi Akebono...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: So they're selling these cakes nearby and—

text_block_list.name: Hunched Man
text_block_list.text:
You're blocking the road, brat! Get outta the
way!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: O-oh! I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A man has suddenly shown up behind Hishi
Akebono and is screaming at her, even though
there's plenty of room for him to walk by.
choice_data_list: (I really don't want to let that slide!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...But I'm not alone here, and there's no way I can
risk escalating this and dragging Hishi Akebono
into some kind of incident. I restrain myself, and
the man sneers at us and leaves.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Trainer? You don't have to worry about me, you
know. I'm totally fine.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for getting all worked up on my account,
but I like it better when you're smiling!
choice_data_list: You didn't do anything wrong, though!
You didn't do anything wrong, though!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: But what if I was in the way? There's nothing wrong with being big and tall, but I should still be careful not to get in the way.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I'll just try to walk at the edge of the—Oh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We spot the hunched man we just encountered
bickering with another student just up the road. I
really can't stand by this time!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You're the one getting in everyone's way, ya dunce! Who do you think you are, waltzin' around flailin' your arms all over the place?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Unless you've got the guts to challenge me to a
one-on-one, scram!

text_block_list.name: Hunched Man
text_block_list.text: Hrk! D-damn you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Patter, patter, patter!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hm, pathetic. He should've kept his mouth shut if
that's all it takes to send him runnin' off with his
tail between his legs.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: That was amazing! She's so cool! And that intensity... I felt like I was watching a sumo wrestler!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Maybe if I try glaring, I can pull off that intensity
too... There! Am I doing it right? Do I look scary?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Geez, it sure is hard to look intimidating!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While heading back home after a day of
shopping...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, look! It's Hishiama and that man from
before!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow her line of sight to see that the hunched
man has rounded up some lackeys, and they've
got Hishi Amazon surrounded.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon is chuckling and cracking her
knuckles, ready for a brawl, but nothing good will
come of that. I have to defuse the situation!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon is chuckling and cracking her
knuckles, ready for a brawl, but nothing good will
come of that. I have to defuse the situation!

text_block_list.name: Hunched Man
text_block_list.text: What? What do you want? Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Hunched Man
text_block_list.text: Y-you're that brat from before!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: FIGHTING IS WRONG!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The men flinch at the echo of Hishi Akebono's
booming voice. The hunched man is so shocked
that he snaps to attention, his back ramrod
straight.

text_block_list.name: Hunched Man
text_block_list.text:
Eep! Wh-what's with you people?! Forget this!
Let's get outta here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And just like that, Hishi Akebono's stern
telling-off sends the men scattering like
cockroaches.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It's kinda unsatisfying how easy it was to chase
'em off...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh, are you all right, Hishiama?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, thanks for that. That was pretty badass of
you, Bono.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Really?! Did you hear that, Trainer? Hehehe! Even
Hishiama thinks I've got it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, we report the hunched man to the
police, and so ends the evening during which I
got a glimpse at the typically-calm Hishi
Akebono's more threatening side.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh, Officer! Over here, quick!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono raises her arms and waves them
wildly in the direction of a nearby crowd.

text_block_list.name: Police Officer
text_block_list.text: What's the matter?!

text_block_list.name: Hunched Man
text_block_list.text: Crap! We gotta get outta here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the sight of the approaching police officer, the
hunched man panics and lugs his lackeys away.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I could've taken a couple of punks like that,
easy... But Fuji would never get off my case if she
caught me, so thanks for the help.

text_block_list.name: Police Officer
text_block_list.text:
It's thanks to your waving me down that I
managed to find you all right away. I appreciate
your fast thinking, good citizen!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: O-oh, but I barely did anything... Right, Trainer?
choice_data_list:
It would've been hard to find us just from our
voices.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Does that mean the officer spotted us because
I'm so tall? Wow...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! I guess it is a good thing to be big and tall!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono finally accepts the officer's thanks
and smiles. We head back home afterwards with
our heads held high.
